---
description: "Review UI component or page for PaTan™ production-level brand compliance"
---

Review the following for PaTan™ brand compliance:

## Production Delivery Standard
- Audit for production readiness, not lightweight style patch compliance only.
- Validate integrated behavior across responsive states, accessibility, and interaction states.
- Do not accept placeholder tokens, temporary overrides, or incomplete design-system wiring.
- Report fixes that are deployable and reusable across the shared UI system.

## File or Component: ${target}

## Check against:

### Colors
- [ ] Uses only approved palette (White #FFFFFF, Surface #F8FAFC, Border #E2E8F0, Midnight Blue #0D2B45, Golden Light #F5B942, Forest Green #2E6F40, etc.)
- [ ] Semantic colors used appropriately (success=#2E6F40, warning=#F59E0B, error=#DC2626, info=#2563EB)
- [ ] WCAG AA contrast ratios maintained

### Typography
- [ ] Headings use Merriweather
- [ ] Body/UI uses Inter
- [ ] Scale follows system (56px display → 12px small)

### Voice & Tone
- [ ] Copy is compassionate, encouraging, genuine
- [ ] No comparison or competition language
- [ ] Celebrates progress over achievement
- [ ] Belief-inclusive (not religion-specific)

### UX Principles
- [ ] Designed for emotional safety
- [ ] Reduces friction in storytelling
- [ ] Encourages positive interaction
- [ ] Promotes reflection over comparison

### Accessibility
- [ ] Follows WCAG 2.2 AA standards
- [ ] Proper focus states
- [ ] Screen reader friendly

Report any violations with specific fixes.
